---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new framework skill
title: "[skill] "
labels: skill-request
---

## Framework

Name and version (e.g., HIPAA Security Rule, EU AI Act, NIST CSF 2.0).

## Activation

What kinds of prompts should activate this skill?

## Why this framework

Who is the audience, and what gap does it fill that existing skills do not cover?

## Reference material

Public standards, regulator guidance, and authoritative sources we should ground the skill in.

## Are you offering to draft it?

If yes, when do you expect to open a PR?
